formula: G3P = prod(f(Glucose, Glycerol, Xylose, PGI, PPS, EDD, EDA)) * prod(g(ZWF, GAPA, DXS)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
Pyruvate = prod(f(Glucose, Xylose, PGI, PYKA, PYKF, EDD, EDA)) * prod(g(PPS, LDH, DXS)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
Acetyl_CoA = prod(f(ACEE)) * prod(g(PTA, PPC)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
Mevalonate = prod(f(Acetyl_CoA, ATOB, HMGS, HMGR, NADPH)) * 1.0 * gene_modifier + exogenous
IPP = prod(f(DXS, G3P, Pyruvate, Mevalonate, MVK, MVD, DXR)) * 1.0 * gene_modifier + exogenous
FPP = prod(f(ISPA, IPP, DMAPP)) * prod(g(ISPB)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
ROS = prod(f(Oxygen_Level)) * prod(g(KATE, Lycopene_Titer)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
IDI = prod(f(NRI, IPTG, Arabinose, Plasmid_Copy_Number)) * 1.0 * gene_modifier + exogenous
MVK = prod(f(Plasmid_Copy_Number, ATP)) * prod(g(GPP, FPP, GGPP)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
CRTI = prod(f(IPTG, Plasmid_Copy_Number, NADPH)) * 1.0 * gene_modifier + exogenous
Lycopene_Titer = prod(f(CRTI, Phytoene, MEMBRANE_STORAGE)) * prod(g(Temperature, ROS, ENVELOPE_STRESS)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
